final.faithfulness_contract: CONTRACT v2 — target is ADJUDICATION, not hedging. Absolute rule, unchanged and non-negotiable: no fabricated fact, number, quote, entity, or attribution ships, ever; every validator failure DELETES the candidate, nothing repairs it; any prose matching no class is deleted (no fourth unclassed category can exist). TOPOLOGY RULE (new, closes the L1 leak): the validation baseline is snapshotted BEFORE any mutating pass runs; every pass is diffed against its own pre-pass bytes; no stage may launder output into the baseline it is validated against (fix reflow_report.py which currently takes src_words AFTER purge_confessions). CLASS F (fact): byte-identical to a provenance-verified source sentence; loss/invention/mutation/duplication caught by a Counter multiset over a chrome-normalized key (CHROME_ANY_RE-stripped — a closed, content-free literal set; no drop-lists, no per-sentence exemptions, ever). CLASS F+A (attributed fact): a CLASS F sentence plus an attribution prefix whose every token is a byte-substring of the bibliography/Crossref record keyed by an [n] PRESENT IN THAT SENTENCE; marker-less sentences are ineligible — no borrowed keys, no antecedent guessing; the remainder must stay byte-identical to its class-F form. CLASS S (structure): headings and table cells assembled from sidecar data or deterministic derivation only. Legal heading forms: (i) noun-phrase facet label — no finite verb, plus the FULL class-content ban battery now wired into validate_heading (RESULT_VERBS_BANNED, NUMBER_WORDS_BANNED, NEGATED_FINDING_BANNED, ATTRIBUTION_BANNED, CERTAINTY_BANNED, no digits/units/cites, <=12 words, no new proper nouns); (ii) 'x.y Facet: gloss' where the gloss is a deterministic main-clause truncation of an ALREADY-APPROVED class-A sentence, inheriting that sentence's full gate — no free LLM text in a heading, ever; HEADING_ATTACKS fixture permanently extended with the 7 accepted attack strings and the entity-in-premises variants so the fixture can never again certify a defense it lacks. CLASS A (adjudication — replaces hedge-based CLASS I): a sentence that compares, reconciles, ranks, or delimits findings ALREADY ON THE PAGE. Redesign principle: adjudication adds ORDERING AND WEIGHT to existing facts, never new facts — so confident evaluative stance about the RELATION between cited findings is legal ('X's estimate rests on a broader occupational sample than Y's'; 'the disagreement narrows once exposure is distinguished from adoption'; 'the evidence cannot yet resolve whether...'), while unearned certainty about the WORLD stays banned (CERTAINTY_BANNED retargeted to 'proves/definitively establishes/guarantees', no longer to stance itself). Rules, all fail-closed: (1) premise set = >=2 class-F sentences from >=2 distinct sources in the same section, physically adjacent; the class-A sentence carries no [n] of its own; (2) no digits, units, or NUMBER_WORDS quantities not byte-present in a premise; (3) proper nouns only if byte-present in the PREMISE SET (not the section, not the bibliography — the premise set), and attribution verbs only with such an entity as subject; (4) mechanism/causal noun-phrases must be stem-present in at least one premise span — a new mechanism is a kill, exactly preserving the entailment judge's NEUTRAL-clause boundary; (5) NLI entailment screen over the concatenated premise spans: entailed, or a comparison whose atoms are each individually entailed; (6) contradiction_screen against all section FACTs. GUARANTEE, restated honestly: a class-A sentence cannot introduce a fact, number, entity, mechanism, or attribution because each is blocked by a deterministic string/stem check keyed to its own premise set, backstopped by fail-closed entailment — and headings can no longer bypass this because they either have no predicate (form i) or inherit a gated sentence (form ii).
final.expected_total: Honest sum from 0.4382: L-STRUCT +0.010/+0.017, L-ADJ +0.015/+0.035, L-ATTR +0.004/+0.010 (rider), hygiene riders ~+0.001 (unmeasurable, claimed as zero). Wave-1 total: +0.030 to +0.055, midpoint ~+0.042 -> ~0.48 (range 0.468-0.493). L-DENSE, if it survives its gate, adds +0.005/+0.015 -> best case ~0.50. NO, this does not reach 0.54 — we are honestly ~0.05-0.06 short. The residual is architectural, not parametric: bodhi's 0.5441 comes from prose that is AUTHORED as adjudicated synthesis at 59w/paragraph density, and no report->report pass can retrofit that texture sentence-by-sentence onto a 7.7k-word extraction mosaic. A later wave must move generation-time: a gated generative composer that authors class-A-dense prose natively at ~4.5-5.5k words, verified per-sentence by entailment against retrieved spans (the machinery already exists in provenance_generator.py/entailment_judge.py; the change is using it to admit authored synthesis rather than only extracted bytes). That wave costs real composes (~65 min each, generation noise ~0.016) and a re-proof of the contract at generation time — it should only be funded if the L-ADJ kill test passes, because it is the same thesis at higher stakes.
final.kill_rule: The core thesis is: 'gated adjudication density is what separates 0.4382 from 0.54 — the judge pays for adjudicative moves in the 64%-weight dimensions.' KILL TEST: Arm 2 (L-ADJ) vs Arm 1 (L-STRUCT), k=5 paired on byte-identical artifacts. PRE-GATE (zero judge calls): if <15 class-A blocks survive the gate, the mechanism never fired — fix the gate/generator before scoring; do not score a no-op. KILL CONDITION: if (Arm2 - Arm1) overall < +0.0094 (the 2-sigma resolvable floor) OR the insight dimension delta is <= 0, the thesis is DEAD as a report->report retrofit: stop building class-A tooling on the banked artifact, do NOT fund L-DENSE, and do NOT fund the wave-2 generative composer on this evidence — the residual explanation shifts to composer-native prose quality requiring a from-scratch architecture decision with fresh evidence. Secondary kills: (a) L-STRUCT: if its k=5 readability delta < +0.0094 despite the cleaner-diff proving the structure survived into the judged text, structure-parity is falsified — do not build any ordering/L8 pass; (b) STANDING JUDGE-VISIBILITY GATE on every future lever: any report->report transform whose output, after utils/clean_article.py, diffs trivially against the banked cleaned baseline is invisible to the grader and MUST NOT be scored (this 60-second check would have killed the refuted L1 before it was written); (c) STANDING FLOOR GATE: any lever whose arithmetic ceiling (criterion weight x maximum raw headroom x 0.037/raw-point) is below +0.0094 may only ship as an unmeasured rider, never as an arm.
final.ceiling_honesty: What this plan CANNOT do, and why. (1) It cannot reach 0.54: overall = ours/(ours+reference) is compressive (+1.0 raw on EVERY criterion = only +0.036), and the Good->Excellent band requirement means retrofitted structure and inserted adjudication blocks top out around 0.48-0.50 — crossing into Excellent on the insight criteria demands an argument SEQUENCE authored through the prose, which insertion between extracted walls cannot fake (the admitted failure mode of mechanical reflow: well-shaped paragraphs with no argument thread). (2) It cannot reach bodhi's density regime: 59w median paragraphs at 4.4k words means ~40% of our words must go; deletion-only condensation that deep risks the comprehensiveness breadth criteria (25% of a 0.29-weight dimension) faster than P1 pays, so L-DENSE is capped and gated. (3) It cannot fix P1's authored-synthesis texture ('synthesizing from multiple sources... rather than serially summarizing') sentence-by-sentence: 96% of our sentences are byte-identical extractions by contract, and that is the moat we are explicitly not selling. (4) It cannot buy anything from the L1-class debris/scrub family: RACE's cleaner already deletes 96% of that surface, and the criterion's entire headroom (+0.0035 at a perfect 10) is 2.6x below the measurement floor — permanently closed as a lever class. (5) The cross-dimension bleed channel is real but unfalsifiable at our noise floor as a standalone claim; we ride it, we never budget for it. The 0.54 destination requires the wave-2 generation-time bet (gated generative composer, ~4.5-5.5k authored words, per-sentence entailment verification), which this plan deliberately defers behind the L-ADJ kill test because it is the same adjudication thesis at 10x the cost, and we should not pay for it before the cheap version has proven the judge actually pays for gated adjudication.
